step_rationale: Small GTPase regulating platelet integrin activation and focal adhesion assembly at injury site.
mechanism: RAP1B is a small GTPase that regulates platelet integrin activation and focal adhesion formation, enabling platelet tethering and stable adhesion during coronary thrombosis.

references.title: Proteomic characterization of human coronary thrombus in patients with ST-segment elevation acute myocardial infarction.
